terminal.welcome_message_logged_in:
PONG-CLI v1.0.0 (c) 2025 PongDevs
Type "help" for available commands.
Welcome {{username}}!

loginModal.no_account_signup: Don't have an account? Sign up

registerModal.file_size_limit: File size must be less than 5MB
registerModal.invalid_image_file: Please select a valid image file

twoFAModal.enter_6_digit_code: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

twoFAModal.setup_data_not_found_error: Setup data not found. Please refresh and try again.
twoFAModal.session_refreshed_error: Session refreshed. Please scan the new QR code and try again.
twoFAModal.setup_session_expired_error: Setup session expired. Please close and reopen 2FA setup.

fileModal.click_or_drag_drop: Click to select or drag & drop

newTournamentTestModal.title: Tournament Vertical Flow Test
newTournamentTestModal.login_required: No logged-in user information. Please log in to use.
newTournamentTestModal.match_start_prompt: Match {{matchNum}} is ready. Click to start:
newTournamentTestModal.final_start_prompt: Final match is ready. Click to start:

common.error_occurred_try_again: An error occurred. Please try again.

validation.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
validation.password_no_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
validation.password_no_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
validation.password_no_number: Password must contain at least one number.
validation.password_no_special_char: Password must contain at least one special character (!@#$%^&*).
validation.nickname_too_short: Nickname must be at least 2 characters long.
validation.nickname_too_long: Nickname must be at most 12 characters long.
validation.nickname_invalid_chars: Nickname can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.
validation.password_no_digit: Password must contain at least one digit (0-9)
validation.password_no_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter (a-z)
validation.password_no_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z)
validation.password_no_special_char: Password must contain at least one special character (@#%&!$*)
validation.nickname_length_invalid: Nickname must be between 2 and 16 characters
validation.unable_to_check_availability: Unable to check availability. Please try again.

full_help_text.true:
Available commands:
  help       - Display this help message
  profile    - View user profile (profile <username>)
  play       - Start a game of Pong
  tournament - Open tournament test modal
  logout     - Log out of current session
  friend     - Manage friends (friend follow|unfollow|list)
  2fa        - Manage two-factor authentication (2fa enable|disable|status)
  set        - Update profile settings (set avatar|name)
  clear      - Clear the terminal screen
full_help_text.false:
Available commands:
  help       - Display this help message
  login      - Log into your account
  register   - Create a new account
  clear      - Clear the terminal screen

registerCommand.logout_first: Please logout first to register a new account.

friendCommand.login_first: Please login first to manage friends.
friendCommand.specify_username_to_follow: Please specify a username to follow.
friendCommand.follow_failed: ❌ Failed to follow {{username}}. User may not exist or you may already be following them.
friendCommand.specify_username_to_unfollow: Please specify a username to unfollow.
friendCommand.unfollow_failed: ❌ Failed to unfollow {{username}}. You may not be following this user.
friendCommand.failed_load_friends: ❌ Failed to load friends list. Please try again.

profileCommand.login_first: Please login first to view profiles.

playCommand.login_first: Please login first to play the game.
playCommand.failed_start_game: ❌ Failed to start game. Please try again.

tournamentCommand.failed_open_modal: ❌ Failed to open tournament modal. Please try again.

twoFACommand.login_first: Please login first to manage 2FA settings.

twoFACommand.google_2fa_not_available_2: Google accounts already use secure OAuth authentication.
twoFACommand.twofa_already_enabled: 2FA is already enabled. Use "2fa disable" to disable it first.
twoFACommand.account_more_secure: Your account is now more secure.
twoFACommand.failed_start_setup: ❌ Failed to start 2FA setup. Please try again.
twoFACommand.account_security_updated: Your account security has been updated.
twoFACommand.failed_start_disable: ❌ Failed to start 2FA disable process. Please try again.
twoFACommand.status_unavailable: Unable to check 2FA status - user data not available.
twoFACommand.consider_enabling: Consider enabling 2FA for better security. Use "2fa enable" to set it up.

setCommand.login_first: Please login first to update profile settings.
setCommand.avatar_usage: set avatar        - Upload a new avatar image
setCommand.name_usage: set name <name>   - Update your display name
